case_title: BOARD OF REGENTS OF THE STATE OF FLORIDA VS. RENITA JENELL ATKINS

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO ALAMEDA COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT ATKINS, RENITA JENELL A/K/A RENITA J. ATKINS

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOARD OF REGENTS OF THE STATE OF FLORIDA F/U/B UNIVERSITY OF FLORIDA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ATKINS, RENITA JENELL A/K/A RENITA J. ATKINS $4,650.23 PRINCIPAL, $2,728.98 INTEREST, $135.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,514.51, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO ALAMEDA COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ATKINS, RENITA JENELL A/K/A RENITA J. ATKINS
